title: 3 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment
description:
3 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment

1565 N University Ave, Provo, UT [hidden information], United States

🏡 Apartment Available – Glenwood Apartments (BYU Area)

Looking for someone to take over my lease at Glenwood for the summer! Super fun place to live with an awesome ward and great roommates!! 🫶

I will pay the transfer fee!

💸 Cost:
• $475/month before utilities

🛏️ Details:
• Shared room
• ✨ 2 leases available — move in with a friend! 
• Available April 23rd
• Open for Fall semester renewal

📍 Location & Perks:
• 🚶‍♀️ 10-minute walk to BYU campus
• 🛋️ Fully furnished (TV included!)
• 🏊 Pool + hot tub
• 🧑‍💻 Lounge center
• 🚗 Garage parking available

Such a great setup if you want a social, convenient place close to campus 💙
Message me if you’re interested or want pics!

title: Apartment for rent
description:
This is an AMAZING deal! Female Renters only :)
Available around April 1st
It’s a private room !  A shared apartment with two other girls, but they are all private rooms. 
Shared bathroom with one roommate.

-Shared parking space and shared garage 
Includes pool, theater, gym, hot tub
15 mins away from UVU
Quiet neighborhood!! 

-Utilities range from $50-60 a month. I have never paid more than around $475!

Rooms are unfurnished, but I’m willing to leave some of my furniture behind 
This is a 2 year contract (so it's stable) , but the landlord is super chill and does allow you to sell your contract if you decide to move out. 

-LDS standards preferred, deposit is one month's rent. 

-Ive lived here for almost two years and I have loved it! I’m only moving because I’m getting married!

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment
description:
1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment 

Hi, Guys! I’m moving out of my share bedroom this May. The Wolverine Crossing Apartment share bedroom is $498 per a month plus utilities and I am willing to pay for the first month. It is close to UVU and have transit across the street, and have actives every month. I had a great time in Wolverine Crossing, if you have questions or interest please feel free to reach out!

title: Studio 1 Bath Apartment
description:
Charming Studio Apartment for Rent in Provo, Utah  

This cozy and affordable studio apartment offers comfort and convenience in a fantastic location. Recently updated with new carpet, it provides a fresh, inviting space to call home. You'll enjoy ample parking and easy access to shopping, dining, and the nearby university. The apartment is situated in a charming neighborhood, perfect for those seeking a peaceful setting with everything you need just a short distance away. 

Don't miss out on this great opportunity! Contact us today to schedule a tour.

Rent - $900
Deposit - $500
Utility Stipend -$50 A month (Provo power will be separate in tenants name)

SURV Property Management
[hidden information]

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Townhouse
description: selling my lease in pleasant grove! there will be 4 other roommates and they are all super chill and fun to be around! only reason im selling is because i have a family and am looking to get into a place with them! the rent is 542$ plus utilities and for the location and people you cant beat it!

title: 2 Beds 2.5 Baths - Townhouse
description:
Girls Spring/Summer Contract for Sale Chatham Towne!!
Perfect for BYU or UVU students
This is available as soon as April 20th
Apartment Details:
• 3-floor townhouse
• 2 bed / 2.5 bath
• In-unit washer & dryer 
• Shared room (only 4 girls total in the whole apartment!)
• Right next to BYU
• Right in front of a bus stop 
• Rent is $515/month including parking + utilities
• Parking garage right underneath the apartment 
• Balcony connected to the room 
• Amazing ward + really great community

Also roommate is selling contract so there is two empty spots
Message me if you’re interested or want more details! 💛

title: 3 Beds 1 Bath - House
description:
2 rooms in a 3 bedroom house! Literally the cutest house in Provo, I’m so sad to let it go but have taken the opportunity to live with friends. Best location right off center street. We love walking to the farmers market or down center street for ice cream. One of our room mates is staying and she is so much fun and very clean!

Utilities are not included, but we never pay more than $600 a month. We are looking for April move in, but can be flexible for mid March as well. You’ll be buying our lease that lasts through July but option to renew and stay.Message if you would like a tour!

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath - Apartment
description: This is the upstairs unit of a four-plex on the border of Orem and Provo. It is in a perfect location right between BYU and UVU with all grocery stores and restaurants super close by. It is a very good price for the 2 bed 1 bath in this location. There is parking all around the building and it’s always available. Our landlord has been so helpful and quick to respond if we need anything. The apartment comes with a washer and dryer which makes laundry much easier and more convenient. There is plenty of storage with a closet in each bedroom, a hall closet, a coat closet, and plenty of space in the bathroom. The kitchen is a great size and very open. The appliances work great and there is a lot of cupboard space to keep all your kitchen supplies. We have loved living here but sadly we are moving down south. We are moving the beginning of May so we are looking for a May 1st move in. The apartment is perfect for young couples or a young couple and a baby. Please reach out if you are interested.

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment
description:
1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment

Enjoy tall ceilings in this well-designed basement apartment located in the heart of Lindon. This clean and comfortable space offers:
Brand new appliances
In-unit washer and dryer
WiFi and utilities included
Private, separate entrance
Two off-street parking spots (direct access from the main road)
No pets
Situated next to a peaceful horse pasture, you’ll enjoy a quiet setting while still being just 7 minutes from the freeway for easy commuting.
Available now. Message for details or to schedule a showing.
